name: global-scheduler
description: Codex Team workflows with project-scoped scheduler lifecycle, offline bootstrap, native role attestation, continuity, reconciliation, and recovery guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap Codex Team and operate its isolated project scheduler
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap a generic Codex team without network access, attest native roles, preserve thread continuity, reconcile work, and publish and route tasks through the project-local scheduler.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Codex Team in this project.
Publish and route this project's scheduler tasks.
